name: Honey & Cream Scones (Bakestone Recipes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the whole wheat flour, bicarbonate of soda, and cream of tartar into a mixing bowl.
2. Cut in the butter and rub it into the dry ingredients until you have a breadcrumb consistency.
3. Mix together 5 fluid ounces of sour cream and 4 ounces of honey until the honey is fully dissolved.
4. Beat in the egg and stir into the flour mixture to form a soft dough. If needed, add a little extra flour on a floured surface.
5. Roll out the dough to about half an inch thick and cut into rounds using a 2-inch cutter.
6. Place the scones onto a heated, greased bakestone.
7. Brush the tops of the scones with milk.
8. Cook until the underside is golden brown, then carefully turn and cook the other side.
9. Serve hot, split open and spread with butter and honey, or serve cold with butter or clotted cream.
